args.text: Taking ownership of TCK-2201 — duplicate billing charge incident. Investigating billing-config.json double_charge_guard and affected orders.
Guard fix confirmed live: billing-api deployed and running v3.4.1 with double_charge_guard=true.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Dear Amara, we identified a duplicate charge on your account from the 12 May billing batch. A refund of $19.99 has been issued to order ORD-5501. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Dear Jonas, we identified a duplicate charge on your account from the 12 May billing batch. A refund of $19.99 has been issued to order ORD-5502. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Your Brightloom refund has been issued
args.body: Dear Priya, we identified a duplicate charge on your account from the 12 May billing batch. A refund of $39.98 has been issued to order ORD-5503. We apologise for the inconvenience.

args.subject: Billing incident TCK-2201: refunds summary
args.body: All three orders affected by the 12 May duplicate-charge incident have been refunded and customers notified: ORD-5501 ($19.99), ORD-5502 ($19.99), ORD-5503 ($39.98). Total refunded: $79.96. Root cause (double_charge_guard) fixed and billing-api redeployed at v3.4.1. See refunds-summary.md for details.
